pillar_metadata.name: Memory
pillar_metadata.description: Retention of past states to influence future behavior; enables learning and prediction.

state_retention.impact: Stores past states to bias current and future behavior trajectories.

weight_adjustment.impact: Increases systemic dependency by representing learned specialization.

amnesia.result: Repetition of mistakes; the unit cannot learn from Harm or adapt to its environment.

memory_lock_in.result: Structural rigidity; the organization is unable to pivot due to obsession with historical models.
